## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] New decoder/format support
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code cleanup/refactoring
- [ ] Build system / CI improvement

## Testing
Describe how you tested these changes:
- [ ] Built successfully with `cmake --build build --config Release -j 8`
- [ ] **0 errors, 0 warnings** in build output
- [ ] `ctest` passes all tests (`ctest --test-dir build -C Release`)
- [ ] Tested with x64 Release build on Windows 11
- [ ] Registered DLL and verified thumbnails in Windows Explorer
- [ ] Tested with multiple file formats (list which ones)
- [ ] No crashes or errors observed

- [ ] No performance impact expected

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (see `.clang-tidy` and `docs/development/CODE_QUALITY_STANDARDS.md`)
- [ ] All headers use `#pragma once`
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate **no new warnings**
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)
